title: Resource PRANK
description: A resource pack that swaps the textures of the game and makes Minecraft strange but interesting)
body:
This is a Resource PRANK!

A resource pack that swaps textures, for example: vines are now rails! Cool, right? Or my favorite - grass in the form of iron bars. It looks interesting!

Of course, that's not all, download the resource pack and find out more.

Simply put, I am sure that this resource pack will make you smile or once again make sure that this world is rotten)

If you don't think this is funny, then I really want to see your reaction when you find our MAIN PRANK located in the caves... wa-ha-ha-ha-ha!
